briefdescription.para: A security violation has been detected for the RAM memory space.
A security violation has been detected for the Flash memory space.
A security violation has been detected on one or several peripherals.
SPU events.
Interrupt on RAMACCERR event.
Interrupt on FLASHACCERR event.
Interrupt on PERIPHACCERR event.
SPU interrupts.
Not defined as a non-secure callable region.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 32-byte size.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 64-byte size.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 128-byte size.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 256-byte size.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 512-byte size.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 1024-byte size.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 2048-byte size.
Non-Secure Callable region with a 4096-byte size.
SPU Non-Secure Callable (NSC) region size.
Allow code execution from particular memory region.
Allow write operation on particular memory region.
Allow read operation from particular memory region.
SPU memory region permissions.

detaileddescription.para: Peripheral is always accessible as non-secure.
Peripheral is always accessible as secure.
Non-secure or secure attribute for this peripheral is defined by the PERIPH[n].PERM register.
Peripheral implements the split security mechanism.

briefdescription.para: SPU read capabilities for TrustZone Cortex-M secure attribute.

detaileddescription.para: Peripheral is always accessible as non-secure.
Peripheral is always accessible as secure.
Non-secure or secure attribute for this peripheral is defined by the PERIPH[n].PERM register.
Peripheral implements the split security mechanism.

briefdescription.para: SPU read capabilities for TrustZone Cortex-M privileged attribute.

detaileddescription.para: DMA transfers always have the same security attribute as assigned to the peripheral.
DMA transfers can have a different security attribute than the one assigned to the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: SPU DMA capabilities.
SPU features.
Function for clearing a specific SPU event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the SPU event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_spu_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_spu_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_spu_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting up publication configuration of a given SPU event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to configure.
Channel to connect with published event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing publication configuration of a given SPU event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the capabilities of the current device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
ARM TrustZone support is available.
ARM TrustZone support is not available.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint8_t dppi_id, uint32_t channels_mask, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_dppi_config_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the DPPI channels to be available in particular domains.

detaileddescription.para: Channels are configured as bitmask. Set one in bitmask to make channels available only in secure domain. Set zero to make it available in secure and non-secure domains.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
DPPI peripheral id.
Bitmask with channels configuration.
Lock configuration until next SoC reset.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint8_t gpio_port, uint32_t gpio_mask, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_gpio_config_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the GPIO pins to be available in particular domains.

detaileddescription.para: GPIO pins are configured as bitmask. Set one in bitmask to make particular pin available only in secure domain. Set zero to make it available in secure and non-secure domains.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Port number.
Bitmask with gpio configuration.
Lock configuration until next SoC reset.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint8_t flash_nsc_id, nrf_spu_nsc_size_t flash_nsc_size, uint8_t region_number, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_flashnsc_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring non-secure callable flash region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Non-secure callable flash region ID.
Non-secure callable flash region size.
Flash region number.
Lock configuration until next SoC reset.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint8_t ram_nsc_id, nrf_spu_nsc_size_t ram_nsc_size, uint8_t region_number, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_ramnsc_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring non-secure callable RAM region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Non-secure callable RAM region ID.
Non-secure callable RAM region size.
RAM region number.
Lock configuration until next SoC reset.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint8_t region_id, bool secure_attr, uint32_t permissions, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_flashregion_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring security for a particular flash region.

detaileddescription.para: Permissions parameter must be set by using the logical OR on the nrf_spu_mem_perm_t values.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Flash region index.
Set region attribute to secure.
Flash region permissions.
Lock configuration until next SoC reset.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint8_t region_id, bool secure_attr, uint32_t permissions, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_ramregion_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring security for the RAM region.

detaileddescription.para: Permissions parameter must be set by using the logical OR on the nrf_spu_mem_perm_t values.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
RAM region index.
Set region attribute to secure.
RAM region permissions.
Lock configuration until next SoC reset.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint32_t peripheral_id, bool secure_attr, bool secure_dma, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_peripheral_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring access permissions of the peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
ID number of a particular peripheral.
Peripheral registers accessible only from secure domain.
DMA transfers possible only from RAM memory in secure domain.
Lock configuration until next SoC reset.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, uint32_t domain_id, bool secure_attr, bool lock_conf)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_extdomain_set

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring bus access permissions of the specified external domain.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
ID number of a particular external domain.
Specifies if the bus accesses from this domain have the secure attribute set.
Specifies if the configuration should be locked until next SoC reset.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the security violation.

simplesect.para: The event PERIPHACCERR must be cleared to clear this register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Address of the transaction that caused first error.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the owner ID of the security violation.

simplesect.para: The event PERIPHACCERR must be cleared to clear this register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Owner ID of the transaction that caused first error.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the capabilities for TrustZone Cortex-M secure attribute of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: TrustZone capabilities.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the DMA capabilities of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: DMA capabilities.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the security mapping of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.
Peripheral is mapped in secure peripheral address space.

If TrustZone capabilities are NRF_SPU_SECUREMAPPING_USERSELECTABLE, then peripheral is mapped in non-secure peripheral address space. If TrustZone capabilities are NRF_SPU_SECUREMAPPING_SPLIT, then peripheral is mapped in non-secure and secure peripheral address space.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the security mapping of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: This bit has effect only if TrustZone capabilities are either NRF_SPU_SECUREMAPPING_USERSELECTABLE or NRF_SPU_SECUREMAPPING_SPLIT.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.
True if security mapping is to be set, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the security attribution for the DMA transfer of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: True if DMA transfers initiated by this peripheral have the secure attribute set, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the security attribution for the DMA transfer of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: This bit has effect only if peripheral security mapping is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.
True if secure attribute for the DMA transfer is to be set, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the capabilities for TrustZone Cortex-M privileged attribute of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: TrustZone capabilities.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the privileged mapping of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.
Peripheral is mapped in privileged peripheral address space.

Peripheral is mapped in unprivileged peripheral address space and TrustZone capabilities are NRF_SPU_PRIVLMAPPING_USERSELECTABLE or peripheral is mapped in unprivileged and privileged peripheral address space and TrustZone capabilities are NRF_SPU_PRIVLMAPPING_SPLIT.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the privileged mapping of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: This function has effect only if TrustZone capabilities are either NRF_SPU_PRIVLMAPPING_USERSELECTABLE or NRF_SPU_PRIVLMAPPING_SPLIT.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.
True if privileged mapping is to be set, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the privileged attribution for the DMA transfer of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: True if DMA transfers initiated by this peripheral have the privileged attribute set, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the privileged attribution for the DMA transfer of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: This bit has effect only if peripheral security mapping is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.
True if privileged attribute for the DMA transfer is to be set, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the status of the peripheral access lock of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: When peripheral access lock is enabled, reading or modifying the registers of the peripheral is blocked.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: True if the peripheral access is locked, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the peripheral access lock of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: When peripheral access lock is enabled, reading or modifying the registers of the peripheral is blocked.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the status of the peripheral management lock of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: When peripheral management lock is enabled, modifying the SPU configuration associated with specified peripheral is not possible.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: True if the peripheral management is locked, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the peripheral management lock of the specified slave.

simplesect.para: When peripheral management lock is enabled, modifying the SPU configuration associated with specified peripheral is not possible.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the peripheral owner ID of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: Owner ID.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the peripheral owner ID of the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.
Owner ID to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the indication if owner ID of the specified slave is programmable or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: True if owner ID is programmable, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the indication if peripheral with the specified slave index is present.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Peripheral slave index.

simplesect.para: True if peripheral is present, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type const *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_secattr_get

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the security mapping of the specified feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.
Feature is available for secure usage.
Feature is available for non-secure usage.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_secattr_set

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the security mapping of the specified feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.
True if security mapping is to be set, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type const *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_privlattr_get

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the privilege mapping of the specified feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.
Feature is available for privileged usage.
Feature is available for unprivileged usage.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_privlattr_set

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the privilege mapping of the specified feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.
True if privilege mapping is to be set, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type const *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_lock_get

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the status of the management lock of the specified feature.

simplesect.para: When feature management lock is enabled, modifying the SPU configuration associated with specified feature is not possible.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.

simplesect.para: True if feature management is locked, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_lock_enable

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the management lock of the specified feature.

simplesect.para: When feature management lock is enabled, modifying the SPU configuration associated with specified feature is not possible.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type const *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_block_get

briefdescription.para: Function for getting status of the access lock of the specified feature.

simplesect.para: When feature access lock is enabled, reading or modifying the registers of the feature is blocked.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.

simplesect.para: True if the feature access is locked, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_block_enable

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the feature block of the specified feature.

simplesect.para: When feature access lock is enabled, reading or modifying the registers of the feature is blocked.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type const *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_ownerid_get

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the feature owner ID of the specified feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.

simplesect.para: Owner ID.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_SPU_Type *p_reg, nrf_spu_feature_t feature, uint8_t index, uint8_t subindex, nrf_owner_t owner_id)
memberdef.name: nrf_spu_feature_ownerid_set

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the feature owner ID of the specified feature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Feature to be accessed.
Feature index.
Feature subindex. Only used for applicable features, otherwise skipped.
Owner ID to be set.

briefdescription.para: Presence of peripheral access feature.
Symbol indicating whether register containing information about the transaction that caused peripheral access error is present.
Presence of peripheral privilege attribute feature.
Presence of ownership feature.
Presence of memory feature.
Symbol indicating whether block feature is present.
Symbol indicating whether SPU has registers related to BELLS.
Symbol indicating whether SPU uses DOMAIN register name.
Symbol indicating whether SPU has registers related to IPCT.
Symbol indicating whether SPU has registers related to TDD.
Symbol indicating whether SPU has registers related to MRAMC.
Symbol indicating whether SPU has FEATURE register.
Symbol indicating whether SPU has registers related to COEXC.
Number of peripherals.
Number of IPCT channels.
Number of IPCT interrupts.
Number of DPPI channels.
Number of DPPI channel groups.
Number of GPIOTEs.
Number of GPIOTE channels.
Number of GPIOTE interrupts.
Number of GPIOs.
Number of GPIO pins.
Number of GRTC compare channels.
Number of GRTC interrupts..
Number of Coexistence Client Configurations.
Number of COEXC turnaround timers.
Number of BELL domains.
Number of BELL Domain/Processor features.
Number of TDDs.
Number of MRAMCs.
Hardware access layer for managing the System Protection Unit (SPU) peripheral.
